hero.subtitle: Systems Engineer with 6+ years transforming telecom operations through automation, robust APIs, and project management at +Móvil, Panama.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Transforming Telecom with Code
about.bio1: I'm a Systems Engineer passionate about solving complex real-world problems. Over the past 6+ years at +Móvil (Liberty Latin America), I've led the automation of critical telecom processes — from CSG mediation to CDR processing — reducing operational times by over 80%.
about.bio2: My approach combines robust backend engineering with structured project management. I design systems that process millions of records daily, build APIs that bridge legacy platforms with modern solutions, and lead technical teams toward predictable deliveries.
about.photoAlt: Professional photo of Angelo Navarro, Systems Engineer and Telecom Specialist
